test.notes: 386 tests passed across 49 test files. Fixed 4 failing tests in SearchOverlay.test.tsx (relative image URLs in test mock data replaced with absolute flagcdn.com URLs).

nonBlockingIssues.description: Scarf products share the same price ($15.99). Minor data realism issue.
Search API fetches all records then filters in-memory (SQLite limitation). Consistent with existing /api/products and /api/events patterns.
Error response shape ({ error: '...' }) diverges from success shape ({ products: [...], events: [...] }). Consistent with existing API patterns.
Debounce timer (debounceTimerRef) not cleaned up on unmount. Could cause stale state update if overlay closes during debounce delay.
fetchResults function not wrapped in useCallback — latent maintenance risk.
Old SearchBar component files (SearchBar.tsx, SearchBar.test.tsx) are now dead code — no page imports them after the search overlay replacement.
Auto-focus setTimeout (100ms) has no cleanup on unmount.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md to include /api/search in the public routes list
Updated stable-seed-ids.md to document expanded dataset totals (30 products, 42 events) with category distribution and unique image constraint

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Coding Conventions or a new 'API Routes' section: 'When adding a new public API route, you must also update middleware.ts config.matcher to exclude it from auth protection. The matcher array lists route patterns that trigger authentication redirects — new public routes must be excluded.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: unified-search-api worker initially forgot to update middleware.ts, causing the new /api/search route to redirect to /login. Required a second commit (68685843) to fix. This convention is not documented anywhere.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Image Strategy section: 'Each product must have a unique imageUrl — no two products should share the same flagcdn.com country code.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: seed-data-expansion worker initially created duplicate imageUrls across product categories and had to make ~16 individual edits to fix. The uniqueness constraint is not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'When replacing a component entirely (e.g., SearchBar → SearchOverlay), remove the old component files and their tests from the codebase to prevent dead code accumulation.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: search-overlay-ui worker replaced SearchBar usage across all 4 pages but left the original SearchBar component and test files as dead code.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Platform-worker skill step 2 (TDD) and step 5 (agent-browser interactive verification) should note when they are optional: TDD is not applicable for data-only features (seed changes), and agent-browser verification is not needed for API-only features. Workers reported followedProcedure=true despite skipping these steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: seed-data-expansion skipped TDD (data-only, no new code paths). unified-search-api skipped agent-browser verification (API-only, no UI). Both reported followedProcedure=true in handoffs, which is inaccurate.

rejectedObservations.observation: SearchOverlay is duplicated across 4 page components instead of being placed once in the layout
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an architectural preference, not a bug. The current approach works correctly and each page manages its own search state independently. Moving it to a layout would require shared state management (context or URL params), which adds complexity. Not worth flagging as an issue for a feature that works correctly.
